// Auto-generated by Create_Continuous_4D_Moments_From_JSON.py
// Dimension mode: 4D_xB
// Fit set: Fit_Pars_from_3D_BC_RC_Bayesian
// Generated on 07-13-2026 17:01:47
#include <vector>
#include <cmath>
#include <string>
double rbf_kernel(double r, std::string kernel, double epsilon) {
    if (kernel == "thin_plate_spline") return r*r * std::log(r + 1e-12);
    if (kernel == "linear") return r;
    if (kernel == "multiquadric") return std::sqrt(1.0 + epsilon*epsilon*r*r);
    if (kernel == "gaussian") return std::exp(-epsilon*epsilon*r*r);
    if (kernel == "cubic") return r*r*r;
    return r; // fallback
}

9.51520554e-07, 1.58017361e-06, 1.75344943e-06, 1.53384239e-06, 1.05946313e-06, 3.61019849e-07, 2.63670863e-06, 4.42127229e-06, 4.66872747e-06, 4.06137217e-06, 2.61898387e-06, 7.84040675e-07, 4.95773978e-06, 8.30163316e-06, 8.63688739e-06, 6.79063710e-06, 3.88111919e-06, 7.60341624e-06, 1.31422307e-05, 1.25036747e-05, 9.09399565e-06, 1.10351773e-05, 1.80277030e-05, 1.65093493e-05, 5.07488364e-07, 7.99549939e-07, 8.42894707e-07, 7.12494400e-07, 4.93149070e-07, 1.15604595e-07, 1.83430405e-06, 3.10454686e-06, 3.48172503e-06, 3.28193061e-06, 2.42758065e-06, 1.00839442e-06, 3.15383503e-06, 5.51665229e-06, 6.10715355e-06, 5.52216703e-06, 3.99012158e-06, 1.53359570e-06, 4.77329755e-06, 8.02721954e-06, 8.72315127e-06, 7.34439781e-06, 5.10572793e-06, 6.90132999e-06, 1.18294585e-05, 1.16284383e-05, 9.42755828e-06};
const std::string kernel_fit_par_a = "thin_plate_spline";
const double epsilon_fit_par_a = 7.50000000e-01;
const std::string dim_mode_fit_par_a = "4D_xB";


double ComputeSplineA(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT) {
    double sum = 0.0;
    double r;
    double pt[5];
    if (dim_mode_fit_par_a == "4D") { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else if (dim_mode_fit_par_a == "4D_xB") { pt[0] = xB; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = xB; pt[2] = y; pt[3] = z; pt[4] = pT; } // 5D
    for(int i = 0; i < n_fit_par_a; ++i) {
        r = 0.0;
        for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
            double diff = pt[j] - centers_fit_par_a[i][j];
            r += diff * diff;
        }
        r = std::sqrt(r);
        sum += values_fit_par_a[i] * rbf_kernel(r, kernel_fit_par_a, epsilon_fit_par_a);
    }
    return sum;
}

// --- Fit_Par_B data ---
const int n_fit_par_b = 469;
const double centers_fit_par_b[469][4] = {

-1.66403500e-01, -3.16691869e-01, -8.20539707e-03, -4.17486045e-02, -5.75882178e-02, -8.74679127e-02, -1.55549353e-01, -3.04916256e-01, 5.56616221e-03, 5.79296351e-03, -2.03275329e-02, -1.14001501e-01, -1.70796509e-01, 2.28506834e-02, 2.31774165e-04, -5.46815244e-02, -1.18563617e-01, 4.49481756e-02, -5.46658151e-02, -8.45906047e-02, 1.12583751e-02, -5.10199121e-02, -4.32194448e-02, -1.24419316e-01, -1.51328266e-01, -2.71609217e-01, 3.54023992e-03, -1.81279624e-02, -4.38987794e-02, -4.32900819e-02, -9.98306321e-02, -2.05814826e-01, 3.17336549e-02, 9.23976610e-04, -1.02508589e-02, -6.45616251e-02, -9.89442020e-02, -1.76923759e-01, 1.47127254e-02, 1.88975362e-03, -5.33813904e-02, -4.68716321e-02, -1.26585287e-01, -3.28025438e-02, -3.49513016e-03, -5.01714853e-02, -1.00624261e-01};
const std::string kernel_fit_par_b = "gaussian";
const double epsilon_fit_par_b = 7.50000000e-01;
const std::string dim_mode_fit_par_b = "4D_xB";


double ComputeSplineB(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT) {
    double sum = 0.0;
    double r;
    double pt[5];
    if (dim_mode_fit_par_b == "4D") { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else if (dim_mode_fit_par_b == "4D_xB") { pt[0] = xB; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = xB; pt[2] = y; pt[3] = z; pt[4] = pT; } // 5D
    for(int i = 0; i < n_fit_par_b; ++i) {
        r = 0.0;
        for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
            double diff = pt[j] - centers_fit_par_b[i][j];
            r += diff * diff;
        }
        r = std::sqrt(r);
        sum += values_fit_par_b[i] * rbf_kernel(r, kernel_fit_par_b, epsilon_fit_par_b);
    }
    return sum;
}

// --- Fit_Par_C data ---
const int n_fit_par_c = 469;

-9.09891934e-03, -3.06364220e-02, -3.37348175e-02, -2.44021795e-02, 3.60586904e-03, -3.18640116e-02, -4.25349993e-02, -5.36161261e-02, -2.50000004e-02, -4.40309905e-03, -2.39075760e-02, -4.58831218e-02, -3.99759367e-02, -1.22499748e-02, -2.59088242e-02, -3.01694332e-02, 1.94999992e-02, 4.93027308e-03, -2.98104130e-02, -7.50021503e-03, -1.30702384e-02, -2.51377880e-02, 3.63951581e-02, -2.63398087e-02, -2.51045449e-02, -3.71257701e-02, 8.41304653e-03, 2.34460055e-03, 5.99999986e-02, 2.92331965e-03, -2.30226272e-02, 8.17830860e-03, -1.36065114e-02, 4.25049829e-02, -2.45651014e-03, 1.16858433e-02, -1.59811756e-05, 1.66364596e-02, 2.68395749e-02, -2.62457168e-02, 1.07568860e-02, -3.28562302e-02, -6.25429456e-03, 4.29296317e-04, -4.37983472e-02, -1.75494319e-02, -1.78001648e-02, 2.85522390e-02, -1.69682041e-02, -3.76831437e-02, 2.74978990e-03, -4.46018614e-02, 4.31417816e-02, 4.02707310e-03, -2.37340562e-02, -2.85210791e-02, -3.36987606e-02, -1.32678191e-02, 5.50129300e-02, 9.97686692e-03, -5.60537647e-03, 1.23109872e-02, -2.35711306e-02, -1.73838265e-02, 1.49833177e-03, 1.13286952e-02, -6.72094813e-03, 1.03666093e-02};
const std::string kernel_fit_par_c = "gaussian";
const double epsilon_fit_par_c = 7.50000000e-01;
const std::string dim_mode_fit_par_c = "4D_xB";


double ComputeSplineC(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT) {
    double sum = 0.0;
    double r;
    double pt[5];
    if (dim_mode_fit_par_c == "4D") { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else if (dim_mode_fit_par_c == "4D_xB") { pt[0] = xB; pt[1] = y; pt[2] = z; pt[3] = pT; pt[4] = 0.0; }
    else { pt[0] = Q2; pt[1] = xB; pt[2] = y; pt[3] = z; pt[4] = pT; } // 5D
    for(int i = 0; i < n_fit_par_c; ++i) {
        r = 0.0;
        for(int j = 0; j < 4; ++j) {
            double diff = pt[j] - centers_fit_par_c[i][j];
            r += diff * diff;
        }
        r = std::sqrt(r);
        sum += values_fit_par_c[i] * rbf_kernel(r, kernel_fit_par_c, epsilon_fit_par_c);
    }
    return sum;
}

double ComputeSplineWeight(double Q2, double xB, double y, double z, double pT, double phi_h) {
    double phi_rad = phi_h * TMath::DegToRad();
    double A = ComputeSplineA(Q2, xB, y, z, pT);
    double B = ComputeSplineB(Q2, xB, y, z, pT);
    double C = ComputeSplineC(Q2, xB, y, z, pT);
    return A * (1.0 + B * std::cos(phi_rad) + C * std::cos(2.0 * phi_rad));
}
